reason: BIBLIOGRAPHIC DATA: minor discrepancy in publisher location. The references.bib entry for Federer69 lists address = {New York}. The actual book (Springer reprint, ISBN 978-3-642-62010-2 eBook / 978-3-540-60656-7 print) has the copyright page showing 'Springer-Verlag Berlin Heidelberg GmbH' and the cataloging data listing 'Berlin ; Heidelberg ; New York ; Barcelona ; Budapest ; Hong Kong ; London ; Milan ; Paris ; Santa Clara ; Singapore ; Tokyo'. The original 1969 edition was published by Springer-Verlag New York, so listing 'New York' is defensible for the original edition. However, the PDF on file is the 1996 Classics in Mathematics reprint (as shown on the title page: 'Reprint of the 1969 Edition'), not the 1969 original. The series name in the bib entry ('Die Grundlehren der mathematischen Wissenschaften') matches the original 1969 series name shown on the copyright page, so that is correct. Volume 153 is also confirmed correct.
